name: Patient Engine
tagline: Fills the schedule for clinics and practices.
summary: A complete front-desk AI for healthcare — it answers every call, books new patients around the clock, and turns happy patients into reviews.

HIPAA-aware capture and routing (never gives medical advice)
outcomes: No new patient lost to voicemail
Front desk freed up for the patients in the room
A steady climb in local reviews and search rank

seoDescription: An AI front desk for healthcare practices: answers every call, books patients 24/7, and builds reviews. HIPAA-aware. Built by Walt Burge in Oxford, MS.
